─[ Adoption Experience and Compatibility ]─ ┐

Adoption Experience and Compatibility

Goal

Make early adoption faster and clearer for new operators through quick verification, practical examples, and explicit compatibility coverage.

Scope

1. First-run verification

  • Add a 60-second quick verification block — Done (2026-02-11)
  • Include expected outputs for validate-consistency, docs build/serve
  • All 3 bootstrap paths (Windows PowerShell, curl/WSL, wget/WSL) validated under 60 seconds — see Bootstrap Testing runbook (archived in lorehq-legacy)

2. Compatibility matrix

  • Publish a single compatibility table covering OS, runtime, agent clients — Done (2026-02-17), published as Platform Support in lore-docs
  • Link matrix from quickstart and getting started guides — Done (2026-02-17), linked from getting-started.md nav
  • Document known caveats by platform — Done (2026-02-17), included in platform-support.md (known gaps per platform)

3. First-impression docs tightening

Consolidated into Launch Content and Distribution Section 2 (README Overhaul) — same scope, single owner.

4. Real-world examples

  • Publish 2-3 concrete workflow references aligned to launch personas
    • systems engineer
    • AI engineer
    • homelab operator
  • Keep examples outcome-focused (inputs, actions, observed value, gotchas)

5. Adoption metrics loop

  • Define lightweight launch-week and monthly adoption snapshot (new users, top failures, docs gaps)
  • Feed recurring failure themes into roadmap prioritization

Success Criteria

  • Quickstart contains fast verification block (2026-02-11)
  • Compatibility matrix published and linked (2026-02-12)
  • New visitor can understand “what is this?” from docs homepage in under 30 seconds — owned by Launch Content and Distribution

Dependencies

  • Depends on community/release governance for public-facing messaging consistency
  • Benefits from launch proof outputs to keep examples evidence-backed

Test Plan

bash scripts/validate-consistency.sh
PgUp/PgDn: scroll b: bulk commands q: quit x: menu ← → ↑ ↓: navigate
Donate 0.24.4
